delete_confirm_body: Delete "{{title}}"? This page will be permanently removed.
delete_page_confirm: Delete this page? It will be removed from your site's navigation.
empty_state_description: Add pages to your site — About, Team, and more. Each page appears as a tab in the menu.
empty_editor: Select a page to start editing
slug_adjusted: This URL was already in use — we've adjusted it. Edit if you'd like a different URL.
nav_bar_intro: In addition to stories and objects, Telar lets you create standalone pages for your site — an About page, a Team page, methodology notes, or anything else you'd like to share with your readers.
nav_bar_instructions: Pages appear in your site's top menu bar. Use the preview below to manage them: drag items to rearrange the menu order, click a page to edit its content, or use the + New Page button to add one.
